history.content:
<thought>
I am at (row2, col2) facing right. The cell directly in front is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. Turning left would make me face up, but the cell above is a wall (#), so that leads to a dead end. Turning right will make me face down, and the cell below is empty (.), allowing me to move forward. Therefore, I should turn right first to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at the cell with 'v' facing down. The goal 'G' is at the bottom-right area. Moving forward will take me to an empty cell at (2,1), which is safe. From there I can turn and navigate around the lava to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (row3, col2) facing down (v). The goal is at (row4, col4). To reach the goal, I can turn left to face east, then move forward twice to (row3, col4), then turn right to face down, then move forward to the goal at (row4, col4). The first step is to turn left.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, and the goal is located at the bottom row, third column (assuming zero-indexed). From my current position (row2, col1), moving forward twice will bring me to (row2, col3), which is a floor cell. Then turning right will let me face down, and moving forward once will reach the goal at (row3, col3). The immediate next step is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 2, column 2 (0-indexed) facing right. The goal is at row 3, column 3. The cell directly ahead (row 2, column 3) is empty, so I can move forward safely. After that, I will need to turn right to face down and then move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (row2, col3) facing right (`>`). The goal is directly below me at (row3, col3). I need to turn to face south (down) to move onto the goal. Turning right (clockwise) will change my orientation from right to down. Then I can move forward.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (row2, col3) facing down, and the goal is directly below me at (row3, col3). Moving forward will take me to the goal.
</thought>
<action>MOVE_FORWARD</action>
